content.en:
Killing so many Eternal Tribulation Clans was enough for Ye Tian to exchange enough resources to help him break through to the Triple Supreme or even Quadruple Supreme realm, so he was ready to leave and not continue the adventure.

After all, this body also carried a finger of the power of the Eternal Realm, which could not be lost, otherwise the loss would be too great.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian was about to leave Fengguhe, but at this moment, he sensed a large fluctuation in the battle, and the battle situation there was probably very fierce.

"Large-scale battles?"

Ye Tian guessed.

He wondered if he should participate, or should he just choose to leave regardless of the large-scale battle?

"Take a look, what if it's a big opportunity, besides, with my strength, as long as I am not surrounded by many Sixfold Supremes, I am not afraid of danger, and I can even leave easily!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he sneaked into the past.

Soon, he was on the battlefield.

A large number of Eternal Tribulation and the Supreme are fighting here, among which there are many of the Sixfold Ones, and the battle situation is extremely tragic, even the Fivefold Ones can only be regarded as powerful cannon fodder, and they will fall here if they are not careful.

And at this moment, many Eternal Tribulation clans guarded an island, and the dense large array protected it, although many of the large arrays were damaged, but the Supreme Ones could not attack here for a while.

Clearly, the Supreme One's goal is this island.

Suddenly, a sixfold supreme entered the battlefield with a top-notch source weapon in his hand, and suddenly burst out with a combat power comparable to that of a top-of-the-line sevenfold supreme, and he was a peerless genius, I am afraid that he was not weaker than the Void God Son.

In an instant, three Eternal Tribulation Clans of the Sixfold Supreme Realm were severely damaged.

Then, the Sixfold Supreme Beings sacrificed their Defensive Source Weapon and rushed to the island under the protection of many Supreme Beings.

I saw that he took out the Formation Breaking Source Weapon, and the power of one blow directly penetrated all the dense formations.

Tear and pull!

The island was shattered, revealing a vast vein below the island that connected to the bottom of the Kazegu River.

This is not a wind-sourced crystal sand vein, but a ......

"Oh my God, it's the Wind Source Golden Crystal Vein!"

Ye Tiandu's heart was moved.

Although the Wind Source Gold Crystal belongs to the same vein as the Wind Source Crystal Sand, the value is very different, the Wind Source Gold Crystal can not only be used to refine the source weapon, but can even extract the material of the Wind Source Gold Liquid, and this substance is of great help to the Eternals, and the value is much higher than that of the Eternal Tribulation Crystal.

How many Wind Source Gold Crystals can be born from such a Wind Source Gold Crystal Vein? It's unimaginable.

It is conceivable how huge the value of this Wind Source Golden Crystal Vein is, even a half-step Eternal Realm powerhouse will be excited!

However, it is also troublesome to mine the wind source gold crystal vein.

The Wind Source Gold Crystal vein is too strong, and it is naturally very difficult to separate the Wind Source Gold Crystal, and the ore vein is connected to the Wind Ancient River, if you want to uproot the ore vein at once, even if it is a half-step Eternal Realm, you can't do it, unless it is a real Eternal Realm.

The Eternal Tribulation had discovered this vein and had been mining it secretly, but it was not very efficient.

But even so, the Eternal Tribulation Clan also mined a lot of Wind Source Gold Crystals and made a lot of money!

At this time, many supreme beings had broken into the Wind Source Gold Crystal vein, and they didn't think about getting many Wind Source Gold Crystals, even if they obtained a large piece of Wind Source Gold Crystals, it would be a huge gain.

Thundered!!!!

A supreme being was bombarding the ore veins, not caring at all if they would damage some of the Wind Source Gold Crystals.

Occasionally, a piece of Wind Source Gold Crystal popped up, and after the Supreme One snatched it, he directly chose to flee from here, not thinking about the second Wind Source Gold Crystal at all.

Ye Tian didn't make a move immediately, except for that Eternal Realm finger, his real strength was not very strong, and if his conventional combat power was not good, he would not be able to fight for a long time, he couldn't just snatch a few pieces of Wind Source Golden Crystal, right?

Therefore, he was waiting for an opportunity.

At this time, not only were the Supreme Ones snatching the Wind Source Golden Crystal, but the Eternal Tribulation Clan saw that they couldn't stop it, and they also began to snatch the Wind Source Golden Crystal with the Supreme Ones.

I have to say that the number of the Eternal Tribulation Clan is still quite a lot, so they have snatched a lot of Wind Source Golden Crystals, but there are also many Wind Source Golden Crystals that have been destroyed, after all, the Supreme Ones' mining methods are too barbaric, and if they directly bombard with Supreme Techniques, almost seventy or eighty percent of the Wind Source Golden Crystals will be wasted.

But without this method, it would take a long time to mine a piece of Wind Source Gold Crystal, how could there be such a long time for them now?

Time passed slowly, and this wind source gold crystal vein had been torn apart, and it was miserable.

However, a lot of wind source gold crystals were still mined.

However, many Supreme Beings ran away after snatching the Wind Source Golden Crystal, and it was the Eternal Tribulation Clan who had the advantage at the moment.

In desperation, the other supreme beings did not dare to stay here and chose to flee.

The Eternal Tribulation Clan was also worried that their Wind Source Golden Crystals would be snatched by the Supreme Ones, so they had to send these Wind Source Golden Crystals out of the Wind Ancient River as soon as possible.

And so.

Those Eternal Tribulators who snatched the Wind Source Golden Crystal immediately took out their Wind Source Golden Crystal and handed it over to a Sixfold Supreme Being, this Sixfold Supreme was very powerful, he was the leader of the team here, and he was also a powerful existence comparable to the Void God Son.

Just when this Eternal Tribulation Clan collected the Wind Source Golden Crystal and chose to leave here and return to the headquarters of the Eternal Tribulation Clan, Ye Tian made a move.

"Good chance!"

Ye Tian immediately urged the Eternal Realm finger and cast the Destruction Finger.

This time, although he didn't use all his strength to urge that Eternal Realm finger, he also almost urged most of his strength, and unleashed a blow comparable to the combat power of the top eightfold supreme.

"No!"

The Eternal Tribulation and the Eternal Tribulation around him were dumbfounded.

This is a blow comparable to the realm of the Eightfold Supreme, could it be that Feng Guhe has entered an Eightfold Supreme?

But how is this possible?

The Wind Ancient River is currently only allowed to enter the Sixfold Supreme!

Can't stop it!!!

The other Eternal Tribulations had no time to escape because they had gathered together, and they were reduced to ashes one by one, and the Eternal Tribulation Clan, who was comparable to the Son of the Void God, tried to resist the blow with all his might, but it was still a little worse.

Boom!

The Eternal Tribulation's body collapsed, its vitality was annihilated, and it turned into a corpse.

Whoa, whoa, whoa!

Ye Tian took away their corpses and treasures, endured the injuries in his body, and left here at an extremely fast speed.

Soon, Ye Tian came to an exit of the Fenggu River and returned to the outside world.
